params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-register file with 8-bit wide registers. It allows for two sources (src1 and src2) to read data from any of the four registers, while disabling one register (designated by dst) from being written with new data (ip) on a clock edge unless the write enable (we) is inactive. Upon receiving a reset signal (rst), all registers are cleared to zero. The outputs (op1 and op2) reflect the contents of the registers specified by src1 and src2, respectively.
